tasks.title: Percentile indexing uses round() which can return the last index only at exactly p=100, but for p=90 on small arrays it can overshoot.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: process_orf call in compare.ts passes 12 extra arguments while analyze.ts passes 15, indicating the call sites have diverged from the current WASM binding signature.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: process_orf is called with 12 positional arguments but analyze.ts passes 15; the signatures differ, meaning compare.ts uses fewer controls than analyze.ts.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: ColorMatrix direct-read block uses a hardcoded absolute offset (0x280a) that is file-specific and will silently produce garbage for any other ORF.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: TIFF header magic check and all subsequent offset reads have no bounds checks; a truncated or corrupt file will produce uncaught RangeError or silent garbage reads.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: Inline SHORT extraction for WB tags splits val assuming the two 16-bit shorts are packed in a specific byte order, but the bit-shift logic doesn't match the LE/BE endian flag correctly for the high 16 bits.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: IP sub-IFD ColorMatrix branch reads from `base_off + val` but the outer loop already computes `ap = base_off + val`; the variable `p` is re-derived redundantly and shadows the outer `ap`, obscuring whether the same value is used.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: browser.close() is called unconditionally in the finally-less structure, but if waitForSelector throws a non-timeout error the catch block may rethrow before browser.close() executes.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: page.evaluate callback accesses `c._meta` which is a non-standard DOM property with no type declaration, returning implicitly typed `any`.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: Variable `err` inside the catch block is shadowed by a new `const err` from getAttribute, hiding the original caught error.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: Hardcoded absolute Windows path to a personal photos directory is embedded in source.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: The catch block in the request handler swallows all errors indiscriminately, treating permission errors, out-of-memory, and ENOENT identically as 404.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet

tasks.title: Path traversal check only rejects literal `..` segments but does not normalise the path before joining, allowing encoded or OS-specific bypass on Windows.
tasks.reason_for_tier: workalone mode: all tasks at sonnet
